applyTo: "**"
description: "general instructions which are CRITICAL to follow!"
---

# Ensure to ALWAYS

- use `#edit`, `#search` and other tools needed to understand and fix issues in files INSTEAD of deleting and recreating this files, you are allowed to delete and recreate only as last resort or if new file with same name will have different functionality.
- remember to investigate consequences of you actions introducing 'breaking' changes, use `#usages` and other tools needed to do so.
